name: morph-fab-menu
description: A floating action button that morphs into a quick-actions menu: the FAB is a single persistent element that travels and scales from the collapsed circle into the menu header while its plus rotates into a close (×) — a real shared-element move, not a crossfade — as the Card menu springs in around it. A title, a Separator and a cascade of ghost-Button actions (icon tile, label and keyboard shortcut) stagger in on open and reverse-stagger out on close. Built on framer-motion via block-motion, so the whole morph collapses to a plain crossfade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: The FAB is the single toggle in both states, with an aria-label that reflects the state ("Open actions" / "Close actions") and aria-expanded, so it is keyboard- and screen-reader-reachable
The menu title renders as plain text (not a heading) so it never forces a heading level onto the host page, and the actions are grouped with an accessible group label
Each action is a real Button; the icon tiles and the plus/close glyph are decorative and aria-hidden
The travel/scale/rotate + stagger morph respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider, collapsing to a plain crossfade

intents: a floating action button that expands into a quick-actions or create menu
a shared-element morph from a FAB to an action menu
an animated speed-dial / action menu built on ibirdui
